overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in red armor walking through a forest path into a traditional Japanese village during spring. The character is accompanied by NPC villagers and passes through areas with pine trees, cherry blossoms, and wooden buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with pine trees and rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path accompanied by peasant villagers

notable_agents.action: peasant companion walking alongside the main character on the right

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the forest path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
large boulders and rock outcrops beside the path
fallen tree trunks lying on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a forest trail with tall pine trees and rock formations. The samurai character walks forward along a dirt path, accompanied by NPC villagers walking alongside. The environment is dense with vegetation and partially shaded by the forest canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with coastal views and stone walls

events.description: path opens to reveal coastal water view visible through trees on the left
companion rejoins from the right side and walks alongside

agents.ego_description: continuing along widening path with coastal views becoming visible on the left

notable_agents.action: peasant villager walking alongside on the right side of the path

entered.detail: distant view of water or sea visible through the forest canopy
stone retaining walls appearing along the right side of the path
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path widens as the forest opens up, revealing a coastal water view on the left. Stone walls appear along the right side of the trail. The character continues walking with a companion, passing a traditional stone lantern as the environment transitions from dense forest to forest edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with prominent cherry blossom trees

events.description: entering village area with large cherry blossom trees becoming prominent
approaching traditional wooden buildings as path becomes more structured with stone steps

agents.ego_description: walking into village entrance area passing under cherry blossoms and stone walls

notable_agents.action: villager with basket walking ahead on the path toward the village

entered.detail: large mature cherry blossom tree with pink flowers dominating the view ahead
stone steps and paved sections on the village path
wooden fencing along the left side of the path
traditional Japanese wooden house with tiled roof becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village area where large cherry blossom trees with pink blooms dominate the scene. The path becomes more structured with stone steps and walls. Traditional wooden houses and fences appear as the forest gives way to the built environment. More villagers are visible walking through this transitional zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese village street with wooden houses

events.description: fully entering village street lined with traditional wooden houses and hay stacks
passing hay stacks and continuing through the village center

agents.ego_description: walking through village street observing wooden houses and passing villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in brown clothing walking ahead on the village path

entered.detail: stacks of hay or straw beside the village path
wider dirt path through the village center
additional village buildings visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the heart of the village, passing traditional wooden houses with tiled roofs and hay stacks along the path. The cherry blossom trees recede into the background as the built environment becomes dominant. Villagers walk along the dirt street, and distant village structures are visible ahead as the path continues deeper into the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dense, shaded forest trail into the heart of a traditional Japanese village. It begins on a dirt path flanked by tall pine trees and rock formations, where the samurai and accompanying villagers move through thick vegetation. As the forest opens up, the path widens to reveal a coastal water view on the left and stone walls on the right, passing a traditional stone lantern at the forest's edge. The scene then shifts into a transitional zone dominated by blooming pink cherry blossom trees and structured stone steps, where wooden houses and fences begin to replace the wilderness. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the settlement, passing tiled roofs and haystacks as the natural landscape recedes and the built environment of the village becomes dominant.
